Notice Of Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories And To Compel; Attendance At Deposition; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-07-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE
Charles Owen Geerhart, Esq., appeared for Plaintiff and moving party: Russell King
No appearance stated by Defendant

RULING: Plaintiff Russell King's Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories And To Compel Attendance At Deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant David Kaleuati's failure to respond and failure to appear for his deposition were a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant David Kaleuati is ordered to respond to the form interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant David Kaleuati is ordered to appear for his deposition on a date to be noticed by Plaintiff, and to be completed no later than June 6, 2008. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $700, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Response To Form Interrogaories And To Compel Attendace At Deposition; Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-03-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Response To Form Interrogatories And To Compel Attendance At Deposition, And Request For Sanctions is ordered off calendar. No proof of service has been filed. A proof of service was attached to the proposed order, which was not filed. Even if it had been filed, the notice was insufficient per C.C.P. Sections 1005 and 1013 as the motion must be filed as well as served 16 court days prior to the hearing, plus five days for service by mail. The first day this motion could have been heard is April 7, 2008. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT. MATTER NOT REPORTED

MEDIATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
